tools.signPdf.instruction1.zh: 点击工具栏中的签名工具（钢笔图标）

tools.signPdf.instruction2.en: Draw, type, or upload your signature
tools.signPdf.instruction2.zh: 绘制、输入或上传您的签名

tools.signPdf.instruction3.en: Click where you want to place the signature
tools.signPdf.instruction3.zh: 点击要放置签名的位置

tools.signPdf.instruction4.en: Click "Save Signed PDF" below when done
tools.signPdf.instruction4.zh: 完成后点击下方的「保存签名PDF」

tools.signPdf.flattenOption.zh: 扁平化签名（推荐 - 使签名永久）

tools.cropPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to crop.
tools.cropPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行裁剪。

tools.repairPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to repair.
tools.repairPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行修复。

tools.dividePages.previewInfo.en: Each page will be divided based on the selected option.
tools.dividePages.previewInfo.zh: 每页将根据所选选项进行分割。

tools.encryptPdf.privacyNotice.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
tools.encryptPdf.privacyNotice.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。

tools.encryptPdf.userPasswordHint.en: Required to open and view the PDF.
tools.encryptPdf.userPasswordHint.zh: 打开和查看PDF时需要此密码。

tools.encryptPdf.ownerPasswordHint.en: Required to modify permissions or remove encryption.
tools.encryptPdf.ownerPasswordHint.zh: 修改权限或移除加密时需要此密码。

tools.encryptPdf.successHint.en: Remember to save your passwords securely.

tools.decryptPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an encrypted PDF file.
tools.decryptPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放加密的PDF文件到此处。

tools.decryptPdf.privacyNotice.en: 🔒 Your password is processed locally and never sent to any server.
tools.decryptPdf.privacyNotice.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。

tools.decryptPdf.passwordHint.en: Leave empty if the PDF only has owner password restrictions.
tools.decryptPdf.passwordHint.zh: 如果PDF仅有所有者密码限制，可留空。

tools.decryptPdf.successHint.en: The PDF is now unlocked and can be opened without a password.
tools.decryptPdf.successHint.zh: PDF现已解锁，无需密码即可打开。

tools.decryptPdf.invalidPassword.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
tools.decryptPdf.invalidPassword.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。

tools.rotatePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to rotate pages.
tools.rotatePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以旋转页面。

tools.rotatePdf.hint.en: Click the rotation buttons on each page to rotate individually, or use the buttons above to rotate all pages.
tools.rotatePdf.hint.zh: 点击每页上的旋转按钮单独旋转，或使用上方按钮旋转所有页面。

tools.rotateCustom.successMessage.en: Rotation completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.rotateCustom.successMessage.zh: 旋转完成！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.addBlankPage.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to add blank pages.
tools.addBlankPage.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以添加空白页。

tools.addBlankPage.positionHint.en: Enter 0 to insert at the beginning, or {total} to insert at the end.
tools.addBlankPage.positionHint.zh: 输入 0 在开头插入，或输入 {total} 在末尾插入。

tools.addBlankPage.successMessage.en: Blank pages added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.addBlankPage.successMessage.zh: 空白页添加成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.reversePages.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to reverse page order.
tools.reversePages.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以反转页面顺序。

tools.reversePages.infoDescription.en: This will reverse the order of all pages in your PDF. The last page will become the first, and so on.
tools.reversePages.infoDescription.zh: 这将反转PDF中所有页面的顺序。最后一页将变成第一页，依此类推。

tools.reversePages.successMessage.en: Page order reversed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.reversePages.successMessage.zh: 页面顺序反转成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.alternateMerge.uploadDescription.en: Upload two or more PDF files to interleave their pages alternately.
tools.alternateMerge.uploadDescription.zh: 上传两个或更多PDF文件以交替合并页面。

tools.alternateMerge.reorderHint.en: Drag and drop to reorder files. Pages will be interleaved in the order shown (1st page from file 1, 1st page from file 2, 2nd page from file 1, etc.).
tools.alternateMerge.reorderHint.zh: 拖放以重新排序文件。页面将按显示顺序交替合并（文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，依此类推）。

tools.alternateMerge.reverseSecondHint.en: Enable this for back-to-front scanned documents
tools.alternateMerge.reverseSecondHint.zh: 适用于从后往前扫描的文档

tools.alternateMerge.howItWorksDescripti.en: Pages are interleaved alternately: Page 1 from File 1, Page 1 from File 2, Page 2 from File 1, Page 2 from File 2, and so on. If documents have different page counts, extra pages are appended at the end.
tools.alternateMerge.howItWorksDescripti.zh: 页面交替合并：文件1的第1页，文件2的第1页，文件1的第2页，文件2的第2页，依此类推。如果文档页数不同，多余的页面将附加在末尾。

tools.alternateMerge.successMessage.en: PDFs interleaved successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.alternateMerge.successMessage.zh: PDF交替合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.combineSinglePage.addSeparator.zh: 在页面之间添加分隔线

tools.combineSinglePage.previewInfo.en: {pages} pages will be combined into 1 continuous {orientation} page.
tools.combineSinglePage.previewInfo.zh: {pages} 页将合并为 1 个连续的{orientation}页面。

tools.combineSinglePage.successMessage.en: Pages combined successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.combineSinglePage.successMessage.zh: 页面合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.addAttachments.pdfUploadDescriptio.en: Select the PDF file to add attachments to.
tools.addAttachments.pdfUploadDescriptio.zh: 选择要添加附件的PDF文件。

tools.addAttachments.attachmentsUploadDe.en: Select files to embed in the PDF. Any file type is supported.
tools.addAttachments.attachmentsUploadDe.zh: 选择要嵌入PDF的文件。支持任何文件类型。

tools.addAttachments.pageRangeHint.en: Specify which pages to attach files to.
tools.addAttachments.pageRangeHint.zh: 指定要附加文件的页面。

tools.addAttachments.successMessage.en: Attachments added successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.addAttachments.successMessage.zh: 附件添加成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.editAttachments.uploadDescription.en: Select a PDF file to view and manage its attachments.
tools.editAttachments.uploadDescription.zh: 选择PDF文件以查看和管理其附件。

tools.editAttachments.noAttachments.en: No attachments found in this PDF file.

tools.editAttachments.selectedCount.zh: 已选择 {count} 个附件待移除

tools.editAttachments.selectAtLeastOne.en: Please select at least one attachment to remove.
tools.editAttachments.selectAtLeastOne.zh: 请至少选择一个附件进行移除。

tools.editAttachments.successMessage.en: Attachments removed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.editAttachments.successMessage.zh: 附件移除成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.comparePdfs.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop or click to browse

tools.comparePdfs.diffView.zh: 差异视图（红色区域显示变化）

tools.comparePdfs.successMessage.en: Comparison complete! Use the view modes and page navigation to explore differences.
tools.comparePdfs.successMessage.zh: 比较完成！使用查看模式和页面导航来探索差异。

tools.pdfToZip.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to package.
tools.pdfToZip.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行打包。

tools.pdfToZip.successMessage.en: Successfully packaged PDF files into a ZIP archive. Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfToZip.successMessage.zh: PDF文件已成功打包为ZIP压缩包。点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.textToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop text files here, or click to browse.
tools.textToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放文本文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.textToPdf.successMessage.en: Text converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.textToPdf.successMessage.zh: 文本已成功转换为PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.txtToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop text files here, or click to browse.
tools.txtToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放文本文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.txtToPdf.successMessage.en: Text converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.txtToPdf.successMessage.zh: 文本已成功转换为PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.txtToPdf.textPlaceholder.en: Type or paste your text here...

tools.txtToPdf.noTextError.en: Please enter some text to convert.

tools.txtToPdf.noFilesError.en: Please add at least 1 text file.
tools.txtToPdf.noFilesError.zh: 请至少添加1个文本文件。

tools.txtToPdf.languageHint.en: Select languages used in your text for proper font support
tools.txtToPdf.languageHint.zh: 选择文本中使用的语言以获得正确的字体支持

tools.jsonToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a JSON file.

tools.pdfToGreyscale.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to convert to greyscale.
tools.pdfToGreyscale.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处转换为灰度。

tools.pdfToJson.successMessage.en: PDF extracted to JSON successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfToJson.successMessage.zh: PDF已成功提取为JSON！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.ocrPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a scanned PDF file here, or click to browse.
tools.ocrPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放扫描的PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.ocrPdf.languagesHint.en: Select one or more languages for better accuracy
tools.ocrPdf.languagesHint.zh: 选择一种或多种语言以提高准确性

tools.ocrPdf.successMessage.en: OCR completed successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.ocrPdf.successMessage.zh: OCR完成！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.ocrPdf.infoText.en: OCR (Optical Character Recognition) extracts text from scanned documents and images. For best results, use high-quality scans and select the correct language(s).
tools.ocrPdf.infoText.zh: OCR（光学字符识别）从扫描文档和图像中提取文本。为获得最佳效果，请使用高质量扫描件并选择正确的语言。

tools.linearizePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can select multiple files.
tools.linearizePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以选择多个文件。

tools.linearizePdf.info.en: Linearization optimizes PDFs for fast web viewing. The first page will display before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience for web-hosted documents.
tools.linearizePdf.info.zh: 线性化优化PDF以实现快速网页浏览。第一页会在整个文件下载完成前显示，改善网页托管文档的用户体验。

tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreams.en: Use object streams for better compression
tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreams.zh: 使用对象流以获得更好的压缩

tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreamsDesc.en: Recommended for smaller file sizes. Disable for maximum compatibility with older PDF readers.
tools.linearizePdf.useObjectStreamsDesc.zh: 推荐使用以获得更小的文件大小。如需与旧版PDF阅读器兼容，请禁用此选项。

tools.pageDimensions.showingFirst50.en: Showing first 50 pages. Download JSON for complete data.
tools.pageDimensions.showingFirst50.zh: 显示前50页。下载JSON获取完整数据。

tools.removeRestrictions.uploadDescripti.en: Drag and drop a restricted PDF file.
tools.removeRestrictions.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放受限制的PDF文件到此处。

tools.removeRestrictions.ownerPasswordPl.zh: 如果知道所有者密码请输入

tools.removeRestrictions.ownerPasswordHi.en: If the PDF has an owner password, enter it here for better results.
tools.removeRestrictions.ownerPasswordHi.zh: 如果PDF有所有者密码，在此输入可获得更好的结果。

tools.removeRestrictions.info.en: This tool removes owner password restrictions that prevent printing, copying, and editing. It works on PDFs with permission restrictions but cannot remove user passwords required to open the document.
tools.removeRestrictions.info.zh: 此工具可移除阻止打印、复制和编辑的所有者密码限制。它适用于有权限限制的PDF，但无法移除打开文档所需的用户密码。

tools.removeRestrictions.warning.en: Only use this tool on PDFs you own or have permission to modify. Removing restrictions from copyrighted material without authorization may violate copyright laws.
tools.removeRestrictions.warning.zh: 请仅对您拥有或有权修改的PDF使用此工具。未经授权移除受版权保护材料的限制可能违反版权法。

tools.removeRestrictions.successHint.en: The PDF can now be printed, copied, and edited without restrictions.
tools.removeRestrictions.successHint.zh: PDF现在可以无限制地打印、复制和编辑。

tools.removeRestrictions.invalidPassword.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
tools.removeRestrictions.invalidPassword.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。

tools.sanitizePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to sanitize.
tools.sanitizePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行清理。

tools.sanitizePdf.info.en: Sanitization removes potentially harmful content from PDFs, making them safer to open and share.
tools.sanitizePdf.info.zh: 清理功能会移除PDF中潜在的有害内容，使其更安全地打开和分享。

tools.flattenPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to flatten.
tools.flattenPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行扁平化。

tools.removeMetadata.info.en: Removing metadata helps protect your privacy by stripping identifying information from the PDF.
tools.removeMetadata.info.zh: 移除元数据有助于保护您的隐私，从PDF中删除识别信息。

tools.changePermissions.privacyNotice.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
tools.changePermissions.privacyNotice.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。

tools.changePermissions.currentPasswordH.en: Required if the PDF is already password-protected.
tools.changePermissions.currentPasswordH.zh: 如果PDF已受密码保护，则需要输入。

tools.changePermissions.newUserPasswordH.en: Users will need this password to open the PDF.
tools.changePermissions.newUserPasswordH.zh: 用户需要此密码才能打开PDF。

tools.changePermissions.newOwnerPassword.zh: 新所有者密码（更改权限）
需要此密码才能执行权限限制。

tools.changePermissions.info.en: Note: Permission enforcement requires PDF encryption. Set an owner password below to enforce restrictions.
tools.changePermissions.info.zh: 注意：权限执行需要PDF加密。请在下方设置所有者密码以执行限制。

tools.changePermissions.allowHighQuality.en: Users can print at high resolution
tools.changePermissions.allowHighQuality.zh: 用户可以高分辨率打印

tools.changePermissions.allowCopyingDesc.en: Users can copy text and images
tools.changePermissions.allowCopyingDesc.zh: 用户可以复制文本和图像

tools.changePermissions.allowAnnotatingD.en: Users can add comments and annotations
tools.changePermissions.allowAnnotatingD.zh: 用户可以添加评论和注释

tools.changePermissions.allowFillingForm.en: Users can fill in form fields
tools.changePermissions.allowFillingForm.zh: 用户可以填写表单字段

tools.changePermissions.allowAccessibili.zh: 屏幕阅读器可以访问内容

tools.changePermissions.allowAssemblyDes.en: Users can insert, delete, or rotate pages
tools.changePermissions.allowAssemblyDes.zh: 用户可以插入、删除或旋转页面

tools.changePermissions.successHint.en: For full permission enforcement, encrypt the PDF with an owner password.
tools.changePermissions.successHint.zh: 如需完全执行权限，请使用所有者密码加密PDF。

tools.changePermissions.invalidPassword.en: The current password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
tools.changePermissions.invalidPassword.zh: 您输入的当前密码不正确，请检查后重试。

tools.changePermissions.passwordRequired.en: This PDF is password-protected. Please enter the current password to proceed.
tools.changePermissions.passwordRequired.zh: 此PDF受密码保护，请输入当前密码以继续。

tools.fixPageSize.scaleFitDesc.en: Scale content to fit within page, maintaining aspect ratio
tools.fixPageSize.scaleFitDesc.zh: 缩放内容以适应页面，保持纵横比

tools.fixPageSize.scaleFillDesc.en: Scale content to fill page, may crop edges
tools.fixPageSize.scaleFillDesc.zh: 缩放内容以填充页面，可能裁剪边缘

tools.fixPageSize.scaleStretchDesc.en: Stretch content to fill page exactly
tools.fixPageSize.scaleStretchDesc.zh: 拉伸内容以完全填充页面

tools.watermark.enterText.en: Please enter text for the watermark.

tools.watermark.selectImage.en: Please select an image file for the watermark.

tools.watermark.unsupportedImage.en: Unsupported image format. Please use PNG or JPG.
tools.watermark.unsupportedImage.zh: 不支持的图片格式，请使用 PNG 或 JPG。

tools.headerFooter.previewHint.en: Enter header or footer text to see preview
tools.headerFooter.previewHint.zh: 输入页眉或页脚文本以查看预览

tools.textColor.thresholdHint.en: Adjust to control which pixels are affected
tools.textColor.thresholdHint.zh: 调整以控制哪些像素会被改变

tools.stamps.instruction1.en: Click the Stamp tool (image icon) in the toolbar above
tools.stamps.instruction1.zh: 点击上方工具栏中的印章工具（图片图标）

tools.stamps.instruction2.en: Click "Add image" to upload your stamp image
tools.stamps.instruction2.zh: 点击「添加图片」上传您的印章图片

tools.stamps.instruction3.en: Click on the PDF where you want to place the stamp
tools.stamps.instruction3.zh: 点击PDF中要放置印章的位置

tools.stamps.instruction4.en: Drag to resize or reposition the stamp
tools.stamps.instruction4.zh: 拖动以调整大小或重新定位印章

tools.stamps.instruction5.en: Click "Save Stamped PDF" below when done
tools.stamps.instruction5.zh: 完成后点击下方的「保存印章PDF」

tools.stamps.viewerNotReady.en: Viewer not ready. Please wait for the PDF to load.
tools.stamps.viewerNotReady.zh: 查看器未就绪，请等待PDF加载完成。

tools.stamps.saveFailed.en: Failed to save stamped PDF. Please try again.

tools.formFiller.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF form.

tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.en: Reading pages and computing information entropy...
tools.removeBlankPages.analyzingPages.zh: 正在读取页面并计算信息熵...

tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.en: Higher sensitivity is more lenient, making pages with slight scanning noise/watermarks easily marked as blank. Recommended blank pages are greyed out with a red diagonal bar. Click cards directly to override: force keep or force delete.
tools.removeBlankPages.sensitivityHint.zh: 值越高判定条件越宽松，即使带有少许墨迹或噪点的页面也会被当成空白页删除。系统推荐删除的页面会显示为置灰和红圈禁止符。你可以直接点击卡片来强行保留或删除某页。

tools.tableOfContents.bookmarkRequired.en: This tool generates a clickable table of contents from existing PDF bookmarks. Please ensure your PDF has bookmarks before using this tool. You can add bookmarks using the Edit Bookmarks tool.
tools.tableOfContents.bookmarkRequired.zh: 此工具从现有PDF书签生成可点击的目录。请确保您的PDF已有书签。您可以使用「编辑书签」工具添加书签。

tools.bookletFoldingSimulator.uploadDesc.en: Drag and drop a PDF file here for 3D folding simulation.
tools.bookletFoldingSimulator.uploadDesc.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行3D折页模拟。

tools.pdfToSlide.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF here to extract outline and charts for slide reconstruction.
tools.pdfToSlide.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，提取大纲与图表重建幻灯片。

tools.pdfToSlide.successMessage.en: Slide reconstruction successful! Click to download PPTX file.
tools.pdfToSlide.successMessage.zh: 幻灯片重建成功！点击下载PPTX文件。

tools.pdfToSlide.outlineExtracting.en: Analyzing document structure and extracting outlines...
tools.pdfToSlide.outlineExtracting.zh: 正在分析文档层级并提炼大纲...

tools.pdfToSlide.chartExtracting.en: Scanning and isolating vector charts and tables as images...
tools.pdfToSlide.chartExtracting.zh: 正在扫描分割矢量图表与表格并保存为独立图像...

tools.einkOptimizer.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop your PDF e-book here to optimize for e-Ink paper contrast.
tools.einkOptimizer.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF电子书到此处，进行墨水屏护眼黑白对比优化。

tools.einkOptimizer.successMessage.en: e-Ink PDF optimization complete! File size successfully shrunk.
tools.einkOptimizer.successMessage.zh: 护眼墨水屏PDF优化完成！文件已成功瘦身。

tools.certCryptor.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop your PDF here to apply a 3D wax seal and certificate lock.
tools.certCryptor.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以放置3D火漆印章及证书锁。

tools.certCryptor.optionsTitle.zh: 物理签名与证书加密选项

tools.certCryptor.successMessage.en: 3D wax-seal imprint and certificate-based encryption applied successfully!
tools.certCryptor.successMessage.zh: 3D火漆签名与双钥证书加密已成功执行！

tools.passportIdComposer.successMessage.zh: 国标证件双面拼版成功！

tools.annotationExporter.uploadDescripti.en: Drag & drop PDF here to extract highlights, comments, and outline notebook.
tools.annotationExporter.uploadDescripti.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以提取所有高亮及笔记大纲。

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.en: Drag & drop PDF here to physically purge background watermarks.
tools.batchWatermarkRemover.uploadDescri.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以一键物理清除水印。

tools.batchWatermarkRemover.successMessa.zh: 水印物理擦除净化完成！

tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.en: Drag & drop PDF here to automatically scan & redact privacy data.
tools.smartDataRedactor.uploadDescriptio.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行隐私脱敏。

tools.smartDataRedactor.processButton.zh: 自动扫描并脱敏敏感词

tools.bookmarksAutoGenerator.uploadDescr.en: Drag & drop PDF here to auto generate bookmarks from structure.

faqPage.subtitle.en: Find answers to common questions about {brand}
faqPage.subtitle.zh: 查找有关 {brand} 的常见问题解答

faqPage.noResults.en: No FAQs found matching your search.
faqPage.noResults.zh: 未找到匹配的常见问题。

faqPage.sections.general.isFree.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft is completely free to use. There are no hidden costs, no premium tiers, and no registration required. All features are available to everyone.
faqPage.sections.general.isFree.answer.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 完全免费使用。没有隐藏费用，没有高级会员，也无需注册。所有功能对每个人开放。

faqPage.sections.general.account.questio.en: Do I need to create an account?

faqPage.sections.general.account.answer.en: No, you don't need to create an account or register to use PDFCraft. Simply visit the website and start using any tool immediately.
faqPage.sections.general.account.answer.zh: 不需要，您无需创建账户或注册即可使用 PDFCraft。只需访问网站即可立即开始使用任何工具。

faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.questi.en: Are my files uploaded to a server?
faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.questi.zh: 我的文件会被上传到服务器吗？

faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.answer.en: No, your files are never uploaded to any server. All PDF processing happens locally in your browser using JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your files never leave your device.
faqPage.sections.privacy.uploaded.answer.zh: 不会，您的文件从未上传到任何服务器。所有 PDF 处理都使用 JavaScript 和 WebAssembly 在浏览器本地进行。您的文件从未离开您的设备。

faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.question.en: Is it safe to use PDFCraft with sensitive documents?
faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.question.zh: 使用 PDFCraft 处理敏感文档安全吗？

faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft is designed with privacy in mind. Since all processing happens locally in your browser, your sensitive documents remain on your device and are never transmitted over the internet.
faqPage.sections.privacy.safe.answer.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 的设计以隐私为重。由于所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，您的敏感文档保留在您的设备上，从未通过互联网传输。

faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.questio.en: What happens to my files after processing?
faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.questio.zh: 处理后我的文件会怎样？

faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.answer.en: Your files are stored temporarily in your browser's memory during processing. Once you close the browser tab or navigate away, all file data is automatically cleared. We don't store any of your files.
faqPage.sections.privacy.storage.answer.zh: 您的文件在处理过程中暂时存储在浏览器的内存中。一旦您关闭浏览器标签页或离开页面，所有文件数据将自动清除。我们不会存储您的任何文件。

faqPage.sections.features.operations.que.en: What PDF operations can I perform?
faqPage.sections.features.operations.que.zh: 我可以执行哪些 PDF 操作？

faqPage.sections.features.operations.ans.en: PDFCraft offers 67+ tools including: merge, split, compress, convert (to/from images, text, JSON), edit, annotate, sign, add watermarks, encrypt/decrypt, OCR, and many more.
faqPage.sections.features.operations.ans.zh: PDFCraft 提供 67+ 个工具，包括：合并、分割、压缩、转换（转为/来自图像、文本、JSON）、编辑、注释、签名、添加水印、加密/解密、OCR 等等。

faqPage.sections.features.merge.question.en: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
faqPage.sections.features.merge.question.zh: 我可以合并多个 PDF 文件吗？

faqPage.sections.features.merge.answer.en: Yes, you can merge multiple PDF files into one. Simply use the Merge PDF tool, upload your files, arrange them in the desired order, and click merge.
faqPage.sections.features.merge.answer.zh: 是的，您可以将多个 PDF 文件合并为一个。只需使用合并 PDF 工具，上传您的文件，按所需顺序排列，然后点击合并。

faqPage.sections.features.images.questio.en: Can I convert images to PDF?
faqPage.sections.features.images.questio.zh: 我可以将图像转换为 PDF 吗？

faqPage.sections.features.images.answer.en: Yes, PDFCraft supports converting various image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, SVG, HEIC) to PDF. You can convert single or multiple images at once.
faqPage.sections.features.images.answer.zh: 是的，PDFCraft 支持将各种图像格式（JPG、PNG、WebP、BMP、TIFF、SVG、HEIC）转换为 PDF。您可以一次转换单个或多个图像。

faqPage.sections.features.edit.question.en: Can I edit text in a PDF?
faqPage.sections.features.edit.question.zh: 我可以编辑 PDF 中的文本吗？

faqPage.sections.features.edit.answer.en: PDFCraft provides annotation and editing tools including highlighting, adding text, shapes, images, and signatures. For full text editing, the PDF Editor tool offers comprehensive annotation capabilities.
faqPage.sections.features.edit.answer.zh: PDFCraft 提供注释和编辑工具，包括高亮、添加文本、形状、图像和签名。如需全文编辑，PDF 编辑器工具提供全面的注释功能。

faqPage.sections.technical.browsers.answ.en: PDFCraft works on all modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. We recommend using the latest version of your browser for the best experience.
faqPage.sections.technical.browsers.answ.zh: PDFCraft 适用于所有现代浏览器，包括 Chrome、Firefox、Safari 和 Edge。我们建议使用最新版本的浏览器以获得最佳体验。

faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.que.en: Is there a file size limit?

faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.ans.en: Most tools support files up to 100MB, with some tools like merge and compress supporting up to 500MB. These limits are in place to ensure smooth performance in your browser.
faqPage.sections.technical.sizeLimit.ans.zh: 大多数工具支持最大 100MB 的文件，合并和压缩等工具支持最大 500MB。这些限制是为了确保浏览器中的流畅性能。

faqPage.sections.technical.slow.question.en: Why is processing slow for large files?
faqPage.sections.technical.slow.question.zh: 为什么大文件处理速度慢？

faqPage.sections.technical.slow.answer.en: Since all processing happens in your browser, performance depends on your device's capabilities. Large files require more memory and processing power. For best results, close other browser tabs and applications.
faqPage.sections.technical.slow.answer.zh: 由于所有处理都在浏览器中进行，性能取决于您设备的能力。大文件需要更多的内存和处理能力。为了获得最佳结果，请关闭其他浏览器标签页和应用程序。

faqPage.sections.technical.offline.answe.en: Currently, PDFCraft requires an internet connection to load the application. However, once loaded, the PDF processing itself happens locally and doesn't require a connection.
faqPage.sections.technical.offline.answe.zh: 目前，PDFCraft 需要互联网连接才能加载应用程序。但是，一旦加载，PDF 处理本身在本地进行，不需要连接。

faqPage.sections.languages.supported.ans.en: PDFCraft is available in 9 languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Chinese, Portuguese, and Arabic (with RTL support).
faqPage.sections.languages.supported.ans.zh: PDFCraft 提供 9 种语言版本：英语、日语、韩语、西班牙语、法语、德语、中文、葡萄牙语和阿拉伯语（支持从右到左）。

faqPage.sections.languages.change.questi.en: How do I change the language?

faqPage.sections.languages.change.answer.en: You can change the language using the language selector in the header. Your preference will be saved for future visits.
faqPage.sections.languages.change.answer.zh: 您可以使用顶部的语言选择器更改语言。您的偏好将被保存以供将来访问。

faqPage.cta.description.en: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Feel free to reach out to us.
faqPage.cta.description.zh: 找不到您想要的答案？请随时联系我们。

aboutPage.description.en: {brand} is a free, privacy-focused PDF toolkit that runs entirely in your browser. With {count}+ professional tools, you can edit, convert, merge, split, and secure your PDF files without ever uploading them to a server.
aboutPage.description.zh: {brand} 是一个免费、注重隐私的 PDF 工具包，完全在您的浏览器中运行。拥有 {count}+ 个专业工具，您可以编辑、转换、合并、分割和保护您的 PDF 文件，而无需将其上传到任何服务器。

aboutPage.mission.p1.en: We believe that everyone should have access to powerful PDF tools without compromising their privacy or paying expensive subscription fees. That's why we created {brand} – a comprehensive PDF toolkit that puts your privacy first.
aboutPage.mission.p1.zh: 我们相信，每个人都应该能够使用强大的 PDF 工具，而无需牺牲隐私或支付昂贵的订阅费用。这就是为什么我们创建了 {brand} —— 一个将您的隐私放在首位的综合 PDF 工具包。

aboutPage.mission.p2.en: Unlike traditional PDF services that require you to upload your files to remote servers, {brand} processes everything locally in your browser. Your sensitive documents never leave your device, giving you complete control over your data.
aboutPage.mission.p2.zh: 与要求您将文件上传到远程服务器的传统 PDF 服务不同，{brand} 在您的浏览器中本地处理所有内容。您的敏感文档从未离开您的设备，让您完全控制您的数据。

aboutPage.mission.p3.en: Whether you're a student, professional, or casual user, {brand} provides all the tools you need to work with PDFs efficiently and securely.
aboutPage.mission.p3.zh: 无论您是学生、专业人士还是普通用户，{brand} 都为您提供高效、安全地处理 PDF 所需的所有工具。

aboutPage.values.privacy.description.en: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring complete privacy and security.
aboutPage.values.privacy.description.zh: 您的文件从未离开您的设备。所有处理都在浏览器本地进行，确保完全的隐私和安全。

aboutPage.values.fast.description.en: Powered by modern web technologies, PDFCraft delivers lightning-fast PDF processing without the need for uploads or downloads.
aboutPage.values.fast.description.zh: 由现代 Web 技术驱动，PDFCraft 提供闪电般的 PDF 处理速度，无需上传或下载。

aboutPage.values.accessible.description.en: Available in 9 languages and works on any device with a modern browser. No installation required.
aboutPage.values.accessible.description.zh: 提供 9 种语言版本，可在任何带有现代浏览器的设备上工作。无需安装。

aboutPage.values.free.description.en: PDFCraft is completely free to use with no hidden costs, no registration required, and no limits on usage.
aboutPage.values.free.description.zh: PDFCraft 完全免费使用，没有隐藏费用，无需注册，也不限制使用次数。

aboutPage.values.openSource.description.en: Built with transparency in mind. Our code is open source, allowing anyone to verify our privacy claims.
aboutPage.values.openSource.description.zh: 以透明为核心构建。我们的代码是开源的，允许任何人验证我们的隐私承诺。

aboutPage.values.community.description.en: Developed with feedback from users around the world. We continuously improve based on your needs.
aboutPage.values.community.description.zh: 根据全球用户的反馈开发。我们会根据您的需求不断改进。

aboutPage.technology.description.en: {brand} is built using cutting-edge web technologies to ensure the best possible experience:
aboutPage.technology.description.zh: {brand} 采用尖端 Web 技术构建，以确保最佳体验：

aboutPage.technology.list.nextjs.zh: <strong1>Next.js</strong1> - 用于快速、SEO友好的页面渲染

aboutPage.technology.list.wasm.zh: <strong1>WebAssembly</strong1> - 提供近乎原生的 PDF 处理性能

aboutPage.technology.list.workers.zh: <strong1>Web Workers</strong1> - 用于非阻塞后台处理

aboutPage.technology.list.pdflib.zh: <strong1>pdf-lib & PDF.js</strong1> - 业界标准的 PDF 操作库

aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.en: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - For secure local storage of your work
aboutPage.technology.list.indexeddb.zh: <strong1>IndexedDB</strong1> - 用于安全地本地存储您的工作

aboutPage.technology.summary.en: This combination of technologies allows us to provide professional-grade PDF tools that run entirely in your browser, without any server-side processing.
aboutPage.technology.summary.zh: 这种技术组合使我们能够提供专业级的 PDF 工具，完全在您的浏览器中运行，无需任何服务器端处理。

aboutPage.cta.description.en: Explore our {count}+ PDF tools and see what {brand} can do for you.
aboutPage.cta.description.zh: 探索我们的 {count}+ 个 PDF 工具，看看 {brand} 能为您做什么。

workflow.workflowTemplates.fullOptimizat.zh: 压缩、扁平化并线性化以获得最佳性能

workflow.workflowTemplates.pdfToPresenta.en: Convert PDF to editable PowerPoint presentation
workflow.workflowTemplates.pdfToPresenta.zh: 将PDF转换为可编辑的PowerPoint演示文稿

workflow.workflowTemplates.unlockAndEdit.zh: 解密受保护的PDF以便编辑

workflow.workflowTemplates.ebookConvert..en: Convert EPUB eBooks to PDF format

workflow.workflowTemplates.batchWatermar.en: Add watermark to multiple PDF files at once
workflow.workflowTemplates.batchWatermar.zh: 一次为多个PDF文件添加水印

workflow.workflowTemplates.archivePrep.d.en: Remove metadata, flatten, and compress for long-term storage
workflow.workflowTemplates.archivePrep.d.zh: 删除元数据、扁平化并压缩以便长期存储

workflow.workflowTemplates.reportAssembl.en: Merge documents, add page numbers, header/footer and table of contents
workflow.workflowTemplates.reportAssembl.zh: 合并文档、添加页码、页眉页脚和目录

workflow.workflowTemplates.invoiceProces.en: Extract pages, add watermark, and compress for email
workflow.workflowTemplates.invoiceProces.zh: 提取页面、添加水印并压缩以便邮件发送

workflow.workflowTemplates.photoAlbum.de.en: Convert images to PDF with page numbers
workflow.workflowTemplates.photoAlbum.de.zh: 将图片转换为带页码的PDF

workflow.workflowTemplates.cropAndResize.en: Crop PDF pages and adjust page dimensions
workflow.workflowTemplates.cropAndResize.zh: 裁剪PDF页面并调整页面尺寸

tools.favorite.hint.en: Click the star icon on any tool to save it here for quick access.
tools.favorite.hint.zh: 点击任意工具上的星形图标可将其添加到收藏，方便快速访问。

tools.quality.hint.en: Higher quality produces larger files and takes longer to convert.
tools.quality.hint.zh: 更高的质量会产生更大的文件，转换时间更长。

tools.bookmark.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to edit bookmarks.
tools.bookmark.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放 PDF 文件到此处以编辑书签。

tools.bookmark.noBookmarks.en: No bookmarks yet. Click 'Add Bookmark' to create one.
tools.bookmark.noBookmarks.zh: 暂无书签。点击“添加书签”开始创建。

tools.bookmark.hint.en: Click a bookmark to preview its page. Use +/✎/× to add child, edit, or delete.
tools.bookmark.hint.zh: 点击书签可预览对应页面。使用 +/✎/× 进行添加子节点、编辑或删除。

tools.bookmark.dragHint.en: Drag and drop to reorder bookmarks

tools.bookmark.replaceConfirm.en: This will replace current bookmarks. Continue?
tools.bookmark.replaceConfirm.zh: 这将替换当前书签。是否继续？

tools.bookmark.noBookmarksFound.en: No bookmarks found in this PDF.
tools.bookmark.noBookmarksFound.zh: 该 PDF 中未找到书签。

tools.pageNumbers.customFormatHint.zh: 使用 {page} 和 {total} 作为占位符

tools.watermark.repeatEnable.en: Tile watermark across the entire page

tools.watermark.staggerDescription.en: Offset alternating rows for a more professional look
tools.watermark.staggerDescription.zh: 使相邻行交替错位，效果更专业

tools.formCreator.selectHint.en: Click a field to select, drag to move, use corner to resize
tools.formCreator.selectHint.zh: 点击选择字段，拖动移动，拖动角落调整大小

tools.formCreator.addFieldHint.en: Click on the PDF to add a {type} field

tools.formCreator.noFieldSelected.en: Select a field to edit its properties, or use the toolbar to add new fields.
tools.formCreator.noFieldSelected.zh: 选择一个字段以编辑其属性，或使用工具栏添加新字段。

tools.formCreator.noFieldsYet.en: No fields added yet. Click on the PDF to add form fields.
tools.formCreator.noFieldsYet.zh: 尚未添加字段。点击PDF添加表单字段。

tools.formCreator.flattenFormHint.en: Make form fields non-editable (converts to static content)
tools.formCreator.flattenFormHint.zh: 使表单字段不可编辑（转换为静态内容）

tools.formCreator.saveInfo.zh: 将保存 {fields} 个表单字段。

tools.formCreator.saveNote.en: Projects are saved locally in your browser.
tools.formCreator.saveNote.zh: 项目保存在浏览器本地存储中。

tools.formCreator.shortcutsHint.en: Shortcuts: Ctrl+Z (Undo) | Ctrl+Y (Redo) | Ctrl+D (Duplicate) | Ctrl+A (Select All) | Delete (Remove)
tools.formCreator.shortcutsHint.zh: 快捷键: Ctrl+Z (撤销) | Ctrl+Y (重做) | Ctrl+D (复制) | Ctrl+A (全选) | Delete (删除)

tools.formCreator.clickToAdd.en: Click on PDF to add field

tools.formCreator.blankPdfNote.en: A blank PDF will be created for you to add form fields.
tools.formCreator.blankPdfNote.zh: 将创建一个空白PDF，您可以在其中添加表单字段。

tools.formCreator.templateHint.en: Or choose a template to get started quickly
tools.formCreator.templateHint.zh: 或选择一个模板快速开始

tools.markdownToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a .md or .markdown file to convert to PDF.
tools.markdownToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放 .md 或 .markdown 文件以转换为 PDF。

tools.markdownToPdf.gfmLabel.en: Enable GitHub Flavored Markdown (tables, task lists, etc.)
tools.markdownToPdf.gfmLabel.zh: 启用 GitHub 风格 Markdown（表格、任务列表等）

tools.markdownToPdf.syntaxHighlightLabel.en: Enable syntax highlighting for code blocks

tools.markdownToPdf.successMessage.en: PDF created successfully! Click download to save.
tools.markdownToPdf.successMessage.zh: PDF 创建成功！点击下载保存。

tools.pdfToDocx.successMessage.en: Your PDF has been successfully converted to DOCX! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfToDocx.successMessage.zh: 您的PDF已成功转换为DOCX！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.pdfToMarkdown.successMessage.en: Your PDF has been successfully converted to Markdown! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.pdfToMarkdown.successMessage.zh: 您的PDF已成功转换为Markdown！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.pdfToMarkdown.failed.en: Failed to convert PDF to Markdown.

tools.pdfToExcel.extractNote.en: Each page's tables will be extracted to separate sheets in the Excel file.
tools.pdfToExcel.extractNote.zh: 每一页的表格都将提取到 Excel 文件中的独立工作表中。

tools.pdfToExcel.successMessage.en: Your PDF tables have been extracted to Excel.
tools.pdfToExcel.successMessage.zh: 您的 PDF 表格已提取到 Excel。

tools.pdfToPptx.dpiHint.en: Higher DPI produces better quality slides but larger file sizes.
tools.pdfToPptx.dpiHint.zh: 较高的 DPI 会产生质量更好的幻灯片，但文件体积也会更大。

tools.pdfToPptx.veryHighSet.zh: 极高 (300 DPI - 最佳质量)

tools.pdfToPptx.successMessage.en: Your PDF has been converted to PowerPoint. Each page is now a slide with full-quality images.
tools.pdfToPptx.successMessage.zh: 您的 PDF 已成功转换为 PowerPoint。每一页现在都是具有高质量图像的幻灯片。

tools.wordToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a Word document (.docx) here, or click to browse.
tools.wordToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放Word文档（.docx）到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.wordToPdf.successMessage.en: Your Word document has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.wordToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的Word文档已成功转换为PDF！

tools.psdToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PSD (Photoshop) file here, or click to browse.
tools.psdToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 将 PSD (Photoshop) 文件拖放到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.psdToPdf.successMessage.en: PSD converted to PDF successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.psdToPdf.successMessage.zh: PSD 已成功转换为 PDF！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.excelToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an Excel file (.xlsx) here, or click to browse.
tools.excelToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放Excel文件（.xlsx）到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.excelToPdf.successMessage.en: Your Excel file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.excelToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的Excel文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.pptxToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PowerPoint file (.pptx) here, or click to browse.
tools.pptxToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PowerPoint文件（.pptx）到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.pptxToPdf.successMessage.en: Your PowerPoint file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.pptxToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的PowerPoint文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.xpsToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an XPS file here, or click to browse.
tools.xpsToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放XPS文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.xpsToPdf.successMessage.en: Your XPS file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.xpsToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的XPS文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.rtfToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an RTF file here, or click to browse.
tools.rtfToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放RTF文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.rtfToPdf.successMessage.en: Your RTF file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.rtfToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的RTF文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.epubToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an EPUB e-book file here, or click to browse.
tools.epubToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放EPUB电子书文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.epubToPdf.successMessage.en: Your EPUB file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.epubToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的EPUB文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.mobiToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a MOBI/AZW e-book file here, or click to browse.
tools.mobiToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放MOBI/AZW电子书文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.mobiToPdf.successMessage.en: Your MOBI file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.mobiToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的MOBI文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.fb2ToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop FB2 e-book files here, or click to browse. Supports multiple files.
tools.fb2ToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放FB2电子书文件到此处，或点击浏览。支持多个文件。

tools.fb2ToPdf.successMessage.en: Your FB2 file(s) have been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.fb2ToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的FB2文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.djvuToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a DJVU file here, or click to browse.
tools.djvuToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放DJVU文件到此处，或点击浏览。

tools.djvuToPdf.dpiHint.en: Higher DPI = larger file size, better quality
tools.djvuToPdf.dpiHint.zh: DPI越高，文件越大，质量越好

tools.djvuToPdf.successMessage.en: Your DJVU file has been successfully converted to PDF!
tools.djvuToPdf.successMessage.zh: 您的DJVU文件已成功转换为PDF！

tools.deskewPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files here. You can process up to 10 files at once.
tools.deskewPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，最多可同时处理10个文件。

tools.deskewPdf.thresholdDesc.en: Higher values detect more subtle skew angles. Default: 10
tools.deskewPdf.thresholdDesc.zh: 值越高越能检测到细微的倾斜。默认值：10

tools.deskewPdf.dpiDesc.en: Higher DPI provides more accurate detection but takes longer.
tools.deskewPdf.dpiDesc.zh: DPI越高检测越准确，但处理时间更长。

tools.pdfBooklet.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to create a booklet layout.
tools.pdfBooklet.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以创建小册子布局。

tools.pdfBooklet.gridModeDesc.en: 1x2 is standard for booklets. Use larger grids to save paper.
tools.pdfBooklet.gridModeDesc.zh: 1x2是标准小册子格式，使用更大网格可节省纸张。

tools.pdfBooklet.previewDesc.en: This preview shows how pages will be arranged on each sheet.
tools.pdfBooklet.previewDesc.zh: 此预览显示页面在每张纸上的排列方式。

tools.pdfBooklet.successMessage.en: Booklet created successfully! Click download to save.
tools.pdfBooklet.successMessage.zh: 小册子创建成功！点击下载保存。

tools.rasterizePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to rasterize into images or a new PDF.
tools.rasterizePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以栅格化为图片或新的PDF。

tools.rasterizePdf.pageRangeDesc.en: Leave empty to convert all pages.

tools.rasterizePdf.successMessage.en: Rasterization complete! Click download to save your file.
tools.rasterizePdf.successMessage.zh: 栅格化完成！点击下载保存文件。

tools.emailToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an email file (.eml) to convert to PDF.
tools.emailToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放邮件文件（.eml）以转换为PDF。

tools.cbzToPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a comic book archive (.cbz) to convert to PDF.
tools.cbzToPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放漫画归档文件（.cbz）以转换为PDF。

tools.pdfToPdfa.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to convert to PDF/A format.
tools.pdfToPdfa.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以转换为PDF/A归档格式。

tools.fontToOutline.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to convert fonts to outlines.
tools.fontToOutline.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以将字体转换为轮廓。

tools.extractTables.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to extract tables from.

tools.extractTables.successMessage.en: Tables extracted successfully! Click download to save.
tools.extractTables.successMessage.zh: 表格提取成功！点击下载保存。

tools.ocgManager.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF to manage its layers (OCG).
tools.ocgManager.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件以管理其图层（OCG）。

tools.pdfReader.uploadDescription.en: Open a PDF file to read and view.
tools.pdfReader.uploadDescription.zh: 打开PDF文件进行阅读和查看。

tools.findAndRedact.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to search and redact text.
tools.findAndRedact.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以搜索并遮盖文本。

tools.findAndRedact.searchTermPlaceholde.en: Enter text to search (e.g., account number, name)...
tools.findAndRedact.searchTermPlaceholde.zh: 输入要搜索的文本（如账号、姓名等）...

tools.findAndRedact.searchInputPlacehold.en: Enter search terms, separated by commas...
tools.findAndRedact.searchInputPlacehold.zh: 输入搜索词，用逗号分隔多个词...

tools.findAndRedact.searchInputHelp.en: Tip: Separate multiple terms with commas (,)
tools.findAndRedact.searchInputHelp.zh: 提示：用逗号分隔多个搜索词（支持中英文逗号）

tools.findAndRedact.multipleTermsPlaceho.en:
Enter search terms (one per line or comma-separated)...
Example:
John Doe
account123
555-1234
tools.findAndRedact.multipleTermsPlaceho.zh:
输入搜索词（每行一个或用逗号分隔）...
示例：
张三
account123
555-1234

tools.findAndRedact.enterSearchTerm.en: Please enter at least one search term.
tools.findAndRedact.enterSearchTerm.zh: 请输入至少一个搜索词。

tools.findAndRedact.noMatchesFound.en: No matches found for the search terms.

tools.findAndRedact.selectMatchesToRedac.en: Please select at least one match to redact.
tools.findAndRedact.selectMatchesToRedac.zh: 请至少选择一处匹配进行遮盖。

tools.findAndRedact.warningText.en: Redaction is permanent. Once applied, the original content cannot be recovered.
tools.findAndRedact.warningText.zh: 遮盖是永久性的。一旦应用，原始内容将无法恢复。

tools.findAndRedact.successMessage.en: Successfully redacted the selected text! Click download to save.
tools.findAndRedact.successMessage.zh: 选中的文本已成功遮盖！点击下载保存。
